headline: Bitcoin Surges Past $60K Amid Fed Inflation Fears

article.title: Bitcoin tops $60K amid Fed inflation talks: Is bull trap or $65K next?
article.summary: Bitcoin rallied above $60,000 despite Federal Reserve rate hike fears and steady outflows from the BTC spot ETFs. Is the rally a bull trap?

headline: Robinhood Launches Blockchain, Eyes £1B UK Crypto Market

article.title: Robinhood rolls out public blockchain, plans crypto trading for UK residents
article.summary: The company announced a suite of DeFi products, plans for launching crypto trading in the UK and its public mainnet after months of testing.

headline: KKR's Musinsa Expands 30% in China Market

article.title: KKR-Backed Musinsa Eyes 'Fast Growth' in China
article.summary: South Korean fashion powerhouse Musinsa is rolling out an aggressive physical store expansion in China and Japan, Co-CEO Nam Cho tells Bloomberg's Shery Anh in an exclusive interview. The firm is also looking at domestic and international exchanges for a highly-anticipated IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

article.title: NZ House Prices Near Three-Year Low on Iran War Worries
article.summary: New Zealand house prices fell for the third straight month in June, nearing a three-year low and adding to signs of an economic slowdown as the global oil shock hits household incomes and consumer confidence.
